  ⎿  Added 13 lines, removed 3 lines                                                                                                        
      38                                                                                                                                    
      39  # Activity anchors (ordered: waiting > working, because approval prompts can                                                      
      40  # briefly coexist with spinner text from the turn that triggered them).                                                           
      41 +#                                                                                                                                 
      42 +# Claude Code's approval prompts have stable, multi-word phrasing that's                                                          
      43 +# unlikely to false-trigger on echoed shell output or message text:                                                               
      44  _WAITING_ANCHORS = (                                                                                                              
      45      "Do you want to proceed?",                                                                                                    
      46      "Do you want to make this edit",                                                                                              
      44 -    "Would you like to",                                                                                                        
      47  )
      46 -_WORKING_ANCHOR = "to interrupt)"  # matches "(esc to interrupt)" and variants                                             
      48  
      48 -# Plan-mode banner anchor. Claude Code renders a persistent footer like                                                    
      49 +# Working spinner footer. Claude Code renders something like:                                                              
      50 +#     ✻ Sublimating… (2m 17s · ↓ 557 tokens · thought for 23s)                                                             
      51 +# where the glyph at the start is ANIMATED (cycles through ✻/·/etc.) and                                                   
      52 +# the verb rotates. The stable part is the ellipsis followed by parenthesised                                              
      53 +# metadata that starts with a duration like "(0s", "(38s", "(2m". The "done"                                               
      54 +# variant ("✻ Crunched for 14m 39s") has neither the ellipsis nor the paren,                                               
      55 +# so it won't match.                                                                                                       
      56 +_WORKING_RE = re.compile(r"…\s*\(\d+[ms]\b")                                                                               
      57 +                                                                                                                           
      58 +# Plan-mode banner. Claude Code renders a persistent footer like                                                           
      59  # "⏸ plan mode on (shift+tab to cycle)" near the input box while plan mode
      60  # is active. Match case-insensitively on the stable substring.
      61  _PLAN_ANCHOR = "plan mode on"

⏺ Update(src/duct/pane_status.py)      
  ⎿  Added 1 line, removed 1 line
      90      tail = _tail(text)              
      91      if any(anchor in tail for anchor in _WAITING_ANCHORS):
      92          return "waiting"                                                                                                          
      93 -    if _WORKING_ANCHOR in tail:                                                                                                   
      93 +    if _WORKING_RE.search(tail):                                                                                                  
      94          return "working"                                                                                                          
      95      return None                                                                                                                   
      96                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                            
⏺ Now I need to save a real captured pane as a canonical fixture and update the synthetic ones. Let me grab a fresh capture of an active  
  session and save it verbatim.
                                              
⏺ Bash(wezterm cli get-text --pane-id 6 2>/dev/null > /tmp/working_capture.txt; wc -l /tmp/working_capture.txt; echo; echo "--- tail ---";
      tail -15 /tmp/working_captur…)
